---
name: Research Issue
about: Report problems with sources, literature, or model assumptions
title: "[Research]"
labels: research
---

### Location

File or directory where the issue occurs.

---

### Description

Describe the research concern or inconsistency.

---

### Supporting Sources

If possible, provide:

- links
- papers
- citations
- conflicting research

---

### Suggested Correction (optional)

Describe a potential fix if you have one.
